geographic_restrictions: Rhode Island, with priority given to students in Central Falls, Pawtucket, Providence, and Woonsocket
project_area: educational enrichment and academic recovery for students affected by COVID-19 learning losses
demographic_requirements: students in Pre-K through grade 12, with priority for those in Central Falls, Pawtucket, Providence, and Woonsocket
eligibility_summary: Open to all public school students in Rhode Island in Pre-K through grade 12, with a focus on those in Central Falls, Pawtucket, Providence, and Woonsocket who experienced learning losses during the COVID-19 pandemic. The program is free and offers project-based learning, student-led seminars, and enrichment opportunities.
